---
title: "Projects"
listing:
    - id: projects
      type: grid
      image-placeholder: science.png
      grid-item-border: false
      image-height: 150px
      fields: [image, title, description]
      grid-columns: 2
      sort: date desc
      contents:
      - "projects/*.qmd"
---

Ongoing and completed research projects on generative AI, active learning, and assessment in undergraduate biology.

::: {#projects}
:::
